description: Coverage Matrix self-contradiction for EC-EDIT-009. The Coverage Matrix row at line 335 maps EC-EDIT-009 to PROP-EDIT-045 only ('| EC-EDIT-009 | PROP-EDIT-045 | Integration | editor-panel.dom.vitest.ts |'). However, PROP-EDIT-045 itself at line 213 explicitly defers OS-sleep/resume coverage: 'OS sleep/resume covered only by the timer mock test (PROP-EDIT-033)'. So the actual covering property is PROP-EDIT-033, not PROP-EDIT-045. The Coverage Matrix row should at minimum include PROP-EDIT-033, otherwise a Phase 3 reviewer following the matrix will conclude EC-EDIT-009 is covered by PROP-EDIT-045 alone — when in fact PROP-EDIT-045's text disclaims OS-sleep coverage and points elsewhere.
suggestedRemediation: Update the Coverage Matrix EC-EDIT-009 row to read: '| EC-EDIT-009 | PROP-EDIT-033, PROP-EDIT-045 | Integration | editor-panel.dom.vitest.ts |'. Alternatively, remove the disclaimer in PROP-EDIT-045 and have it own the OS-sleep assertion directly.
